violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Soap was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory near the dish washing area. A waste receptacle was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory near the dish washing area.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted not properly labeled. Employee food items in walk in cooler are not properly identified to diferentiate from establishment food items and ingredients.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food items on sheet pans noted being stored and covered in a non-food grade bag in walk-in cooler.
